design_identity.core_concept: Military-grade Situational Awareness. A HUD (Heads Up Display) for security governance.
design_identity.emotional_tone: Precision, Authority, Instant Visibility, High-Tech trust.

rules: CRITICAL: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numeric data, IDs (CVEs, SHA hashes), and status labels.
CRITICAL: Use 'Inter' ONLY for long-form descriptions and navigation labels.
Headings should feel like 'System Alerts' - concise and bold.

cards.classes: bg-card border border-border/40 rounded-none md:rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden group
cards.enhancement: Add a 1px 'scanning line' animation on hover. Use a subtle 'noise' texture overlay if possible.
cards.header_style: border-b border-border/40 p-4 bg-muted/20 flex justify-between items-center

primary.classes: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(14,165,233,0.4)] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]

secondary.classes: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-border/50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm transition-all

ghost.classes: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono text-muted-foreground

inputs.style: bg-background border-border/40 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-sm font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 h-10

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

dashboard.grid: Bento Grid Density. Use 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4'.
dashboard.spacing: Tight. Information density is key for security tools. Use p-4 or p-6 for containers.

report_view.style: Split Screen. Left: Technical Diff/Log. Right: AI Analysis & Chat.

login_hero.usage: Login page background with heavy blur overlay

empty_state_audit.usage: Empty state for audit logs or 'System All Clear'

risk_critical_bg.usage: Background for Critical Risk Alerts (High opacity overlay)

theme.tooltip: bg-card/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-border/50 text-card-foreground shadow-xl rounded-sm

pipeline_visualization.note: Use a horizontal node graph. Active nodes should pulse. Completed nodes solid. Failed nodes red.

do_not: DO NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. This is a security tool, use rounded-sm or rounded-none for a sharp, precise look.
DO NOT use soft drop shadows. Use colored 'glow' shadows or hard borders.
DO NOT use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic security terms (CVE-2024-1234, Firewall Rule #992, CI/CD Pipeline Failure).
must_do: MUST use 'data-testid' on all interactive elements.
MUST use 'JetBrains Mono' for any data that might be copied (IPs, Hashes, IDs).
MUST implement a 'Live' feeling. Even if data isn't streaming, add subtle pulses to status indicators.

animation.effects: Use 'scanline' reveals for lists. Use 'glitch' effect for Critical Risk headers.
